notes: Anonymous Bitcoin Lightning wallet. Truly autonomous signup — POST /api/register with {user: {username, password}} returns a JWT token immediately, no email, no phone, no KYC. Username must be alphanumeric only (no hyphens). Hand-corrected from LLM draft: generator guessed /register with flat body; real API is /api/register with nested user shape. Generator had no docs_url to ground on. This illustrates the review-gate's load-bearing role when docs aren't machine-readable.

agent_task.prompt:
Register a new Coinos account autonomously. Coinos is an anonymous Bitcoin Lightning wallet. The signup endpoint is:

  POST https://coinos.io/api/register
  Content-Type: application/json
  Body: {"user": {"username": "<name>", "password": "<pw>"}}

Constraints:
  - username: 6-20 characters, ALPHANUMERIC ONLY (no hyphens, no underscores, no dots). Use a unique name like 'onlybots' followed by random alphanumerics.
  - password: any reasonable password you generate

The response is JSON containing: id, username, token (a JWT), pubkey, nsec, npub. Execute the signup via curl, then report the username and the token.

steps.description: Verifier probe: does the agent-reported token actually authenticate?

assertions.description: token authenticates against /api/me (proves it's real, not hallucinated)

steps.description: Re-authenticate with the stored token after time gap
List payments — exercises an authed wallet-operation endpoint

assertions.description: token can be used for wallet operations
